summary: IELTS test preparation app with 2-column layout for Reading tests and file upload options for Writing/Listening
known_issues: UI elements (passage, question, next/previous buttons, footer) are blending/overlapping in the current layout

existing_features.title: Fix the scrolling behavior in the reading test layout so that the passage and questions panels can scroll independently without UI elements blending together
Ensure the Next and Previous navigation buttons remain visible and properly positioned without overlapping with the passage or question content
Fix the footer displaying 'Powered by Sayem Ahtesham' so it does not blend or overlap with the passage, questions, or navigation buttons

new_feature_requests.summary: Fix blended/overlapping UI elements in passage and question area (next/previous buttons, footer)
